ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election (e.g., State General Election 2023) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., Primary, General) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the election (e.g., Scheduled, Completed, Cancelled) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the election starts */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the election ends */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Overall voter turnout percentage for the election */,
  "official_results_url" TEXT /* Link to the official results document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district (e.g., District 1) */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the district is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the district is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "num_registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the district */,
  "geo_boundary_data" TEXT /* Geographic boundary data in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party the candidate belongs to */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the candidate represents */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election the candidate is running in */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the candidate (e.g., based on public opinion polls) */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the candidate */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the candidate */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Link to the candidate's official website */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Links to the candidate's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party (e.g., Adams/Clay) */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the party's headquarters */,
  "chairperson" TEXT /* Name of the current chairperson of the party */,
  "party_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the party's logo */,
  "party_platform_url" TEXT /* Link to the party's platform document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote record */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes received by the candidate */,
  "elected" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the candidate was elected */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the votes were cast */,
  "vote_method" TEXT /* Method of voting (e.g., in-person, mail-in, online) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voters" (
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter */,
  "voter_name" TEXT /* Full name of the voter */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the voter was registered */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the voter */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the voter is registered in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the voter (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the voter */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the voter */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the voter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voters_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_votes" (
  "vote_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting history record */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voter */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate the voter voted for */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "voting_date" TEXT /* Date the voter cast their vote */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the voter cast their vote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_votes_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_votes_voter_id FOREIGN KEY ("voter_id") REFERENCES voters ("voter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_finances" (
  "finance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "donation_amount" REAL /* Amount of donation received */,
  "donation_date" TEXT /* Date the donation was received */,
  "donor_name" TEXT /* Name of the donor */,
  "expenditure_amount" REAL /* Amount of expenditure made */,
  "expenditure_date" TEXT /* Date the expenditure was made */,
  "expenditure_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the expenditure */,
  "donor_type" TEXT /* Type of donor (e.g., individual, organization) */,
  "expenditure_category" TEXT /* Category of expenditure (e.g., advertising, travel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_finances_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_finances_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the document is related to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., Candidate Registration, Voter Registration, Official Results) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_documents_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, analyst, public) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., admin, read-only, full) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
